title: US stocks recover from tech route as oil slides on Hormuz shipping recovery
description: Stock markets started the day on the back foot as tech stocks came under renewed pressure after Apple announced price hikes on laptops, tablets and other products, citing spiralling memory and storage costs sparked by the rise of artificial intelligence.
content:
Wall Street's main stock indices overcame an early bout of tech jitters Friday thanks to buy-the-dip traders, finishing mildly lower, while oil prices fell as shipping traffic resumed through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Microsoft hikes Xbox prices after Apple increased laptop costs amid global memory shortage
description: Microsoft have hiked the prices of Xbox consoles as the tech industry battles with chip and memory shortages caused by the onset of artificial intelligence.
content:
The tech giant has followed competitor Apple in raising the prices of its core products due to the cost of memory for its systems.
The price hike follows a similar rise last year.
